name: Dustward
short_description: Dustward - Survive the post-apocalyptic ruins! Explore the devastated world, fight mutants, build fortifications, and develop your character in the dynamic survival-action Dustward. Play solo or team up with friends (up to 4 players) in co-op mode to face the dangers of the dead world.
detailed_description:
Dustward - Survive the post-apocalyptic ruins!

Explore the devastated world, fight mutants, build fortifications, and develop your character in the dynamic survival-action Dustward. Play solo or team up with friends (up to 4 players) in co-op mode to face the dangers of the dead world.

Key Features:

  • Engaging campaign and 4-player co-op.

  • Extensive character progression system and unique skills.

  • Base building and trap placement capabilities.

  • Crafting, hunting, and comprehensive survival mechanics.

  • Thoughtful dialogues and interesting quests.

  • Unique enemies and unpredictable danger zones.

Dustward is your personal survival story in a ruthless post-apocalyptic world. Can you endure this nightmare?

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Ukrainian, Turkish, French, Italian, German, Korean
*languages with full audio support
